title: aira littoralis
intro: Aira littoralis, also known as sea hair grass, is a type of plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Aira littoralis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Aira littoralis include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
